scenes.visual_note: The GluMira owl watches over your loved one's data
scenes.subtitle_text: Welcome to GluMira. You're not alone in this journey.
scenes.voice_text: Welcome to GluMira. Caring for someone with diabetes takes courage — and you're not alone in this journey.

scenes.visual_note: Insulin curves build to show how doses work over time
scenes.subtitle_text: Every dose has a shape — a rise, a peak, and a gentle fade.
scenes.voice_text: Every insulin dose has a shape. It rises, peaks, and gently fades. GluMira makes that invisible activity visible.

scenes.visual_note: Overlapping doses illuminate in amber and red
scenes.subtitle_text: When doses overlap, stacking risk appears. GluMira shows you where.
scenes.voice_text: When doses overlap, stacking risk appears. GluMira highlights these moments so you can discuss timing with your healthcare team.

scenes.visual_note: A two-page PDF report slides into view
scenes.subtitle_text: Take a clear, visual report to every doctor visit.
scenes.voice_text: Before every appointment, export a clear visual report. No more guessing — your doctor sees exactly what happened.

scenes.subtitle_text: You're ready. Let's set up your profile.
scenes.voice_text: You're ready. Let's set up your profile and start making insulin visible.
